list.name: column_id
list.label: Columna
list.query: select id from columns order by id

targets.rawSql: select ts as time, concat('C', column_id) as metric, value from historical_series where variable = 'input_weight_kg' and column_id in (${column_id:csv}) order by ts
select ts as time, concat('PV C', column_id) as metric, value from historical_series where variable = 'flow_measured_kg_h' and column_id in (${column_id:csv}) order by ts
select ts as time, concat('SP C', column_id) as metric, value from historical_series where variable = 'flow_setpoint_kg_h' and column_id in (${column_id:csv}) order by ts
select ts as time, concat('C', column_id) as metric, value from historical_series where variable = 'pump_output_pct' and column_id in (${column_id:csv}) order by ts
select ts as time, concat('PV C', column_id) as metric, value from historical_series where variable = 'temperature_pv_c' and column_id in (${column_id:csv}) order by ts
select ts as time, concat('SP C', column_id) as metric, value from historical_series where variable = 'temperature_setpoint_c' and column_id in (${column_id:csv}) order by ts
